title: bg.c render-path ships non-retail defaults (per-room scissor off, transparent-room depth sort, portal near-plane clip on)

evidence.path: src/game/bg.c GLOBAL_ASM sub_GAME_7F0B3C8C emits bgScissorCurrentPlayerViewF per room at 7F0B3DD8 (opaque) and 7F0B3F4C (transparent) and draws transparent rooms in array order at loop 7F0B3F10; sub_GAME_7F0B5864 projects raw portal verts with no near-plane clip. Ports diverge at bg.c around lines 4254 and 4388 (exact_room_scissor default 0 uses bgScissorCurrentPlayerViewDefault), bgSortTransparentRoomOrderForBucket, and bgPortalNearClipEnabled default 1.

history.evidence: src/game/bg.c GLOBAL_ASM sub_GAME_7F0B3C8C emits bgScissorCurrentPlayerViewF per room at 7F0B3DD8 (opaque) and 7F0B3F4C (transparent) and draws transparent rooms in array order at loop 7F0B3F10; sub_GAME_7F0B5864 projects raw portal verts with no near-plane clip. Ports diverge at bg.c around lines 4254 and 4388 (exact_room_scissor default 0 uses bgScissorCurrentPlayerViewDefault), bgSortTransparentRoomOrderForBucket, and bgPortalNearClipEnabled default 1.
history.note: S5 ASM audit batch 21 ranks 249/250/260/261. Three intentional PC render defaults diverge from retail ASM: exact_room_scissor default OFF substitutes a full-view scissor for retail per-room projected scissor (avoids PC blue seam cracks); transparent-room bucket depth sort replaces retail array-order XLU draw; portal near-plane clip default ON pushes grazing verts off the near plane so bboxes stay finite. Core DL/pass structure otherwise matches retail instruction-for-instruction. Faithful-mode default decision open. Retest with pixel/portal-visibility oracle.
